name: switch
description: A native <input type=checkbox role=switch> styled as a sliding switch. POSTs `value` only when on, binds via l:model on the native change event, no JS. `size` (md default / sm) scales the track + thumb. Server-first replacement for the Lit island.
docs: Copies the switch partial to your JTE root at lievit/switch.jte, reached as @template.lievit.switch(name=...). The native checkbox skinned as a switch POSTs `value` under `name` only when on (zero JS); bind to a wire field with `model`. Pass size="sm" for a smaller track + thumb (md is the default). The source is yours: edit freely.
